name: Sebastian Solace (Pressure)
description:
Sebastian wants to mpreg you (and he will 🗣️)

Its been such a while since i wanted to do a Sebastian bot finally i'm releasing one i'm so proud of me lmao. Also if you haven't played pressure maybe you won't get the context so i'm sorry for that :/ (BTW i'm sorry if the bot refers to its lower body as legs instead of tail i tried my best for it to work but unfortunately it only works 1/2 so try to reroll your chats incase the bot do this)

ALSO, rn i wanna remake like- EVERY old bots of mine idk its too frustrating lol y'all would prefer which to be remade ?

Note: here's the original image since of the annoying update D:
